markdown.markdown:
Me

::: {.about-intro} ::: {.about-headshot} ![](images/headshot.jpg){fig-alt="Headshot of Grace Gordon"} ::: I like building fun things with real data. My whole career has been about working with people to make that happen. I'm a Principal Data Scientist & Data Engineer with 10+ years leading data, analytics, and AI delivery across banking, infrastructure, defence, and government. I build the pipelines, manage the platforms, and build and deploy the models — and I also align stakeholders, design solutions, and lead delivery. I like being the person in the middle: moving between strategy discussions, architecture diagrams, and production code. Most of my work has been in high-risk, highly regulated environments. My approach is collaborative and practical, built around a few simple principles: clean code, good data hygiene, clear communication, and understanding the consequences of the decisions we're making. I also have a not-so-secret fascination with graph databases and graph analytics. Lately, I've been exploring how knowledge graphs and generative AI can work together to improve both governance and outcomes. Good AI starts with good information architecture. Welcome to my portfolio, where the strategic, the serious, and the occasionally-just-for-fun all live side by side. ::: ### How I Work - I prefer an email over a meeting. - I prefer a short word over a long one. - I'd rather be in the room with the people who know the domain than off building in a silo — their context makes my work better. - I enjoy mentoring and will almost always make time to talk data. - I like solving problems that actually matter and delivering outcomes people can see. ### Skills - **Data Engineering & Analytics:** Python, SQL, PySpark, Databricks, Microsoft Fabric, ETL, Data Pipelines, Data Architecture - **Machine Learning, Statistics & AI:** Forecasting, Statistical Modeling, Predictive Modeling, Machine Learning, Artificial Intelligence (AI), Generative AI, Large Language Models (LLM), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Simio - **Data Systems & Graphs:** Neo4j, Cypher, Graph Databases, Knowledge Graphs, Cassandra - **Business Intelligence:** Microsoft Power BI, Qlik - **Cloud Platforms:** Microsoft Azure - **Leadership & Delivery:** Technical Leadership, Stakeholder Management, Vendor Management, Budget Management, Mentoring, Project Delivery, Data Governance, Regulatory Compliance - **Tools & Collaboration:** Git, JIRA, Confluence ### Contact - [Email](mailto:gracegordon@duck.com) - [GitHub](https://github.com/GG-makes) - [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/grace-gordon-57459482/)
